user_query: small-intestine MERFISH subcellular-resolution spatial transcriptomics dataset

queries.query: ("small intestine" OR intestine OR intestinal) MERFISH "spatial transcriptomics"
queries.purpose: Find biomedical paper candidates for small-intestine or gut MERFISH spatial transcriptomics.
Cross-check broad scholarly index candidates and DOI/PDF metadata.
Semantic Scholar relevance search; failed due public shared-pool rate limit.

candidate_papers.title: Systematic discovery of subcellular RNA patterns in the gut epithelium
candidate_papers.repository_evidence: PubMed and OpenAlex both identify this as a Genome Biology article matching MERFISH/intestine/spatial transcriptomics terms. Data availability still needs downstream article-page extraction.

candidate_papers.title: Imaging the Intestinal Transcriptome With Multiplexed Error-Robust Fluorescence In Situ Hybridization (MERFISH)
candidate_papers.repository_evidence: PubMed result is method/protocol-like, useful for method context but not clearly a reusable dataset source.
candidate_papers.rejection_reason: Down-ranked because it appears to be a protocol article, not the primary dataset target.

selected_paper.title: Systematic discovery of subcellular RNA patterns in the gut epithelium

selection_reason: Best match returned by both PubMed and OpenAlex for MERFISH/intestine/subcellular spatial terms. Confidence remains medium because paper-lookup metadata did not expose repository data links; downstream article-page/Data availability extraction is required before metadata filling.
